response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the performance as a Hololive concert. 
2. Recognized the performers on stage as Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone, which forms the group 'hololive GAMERS'. 
3. Searched for 'hololive gamers fes 2024 setlist' and then 'We are GAMERS!!!! lyrics' to confirm the song title and retrieve the Japanese and English lyrics. 
4. The performance is a single continuous song. 
5. Structured the information into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A live performance of "We are GAMERS!!!!" by the Hololive Gamers unit, consisting of Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone. The video captures the entire song as part of a Hololive concert.

scenes.description: Live performance by the members of hololive GAMERS (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone) on a concert stage.

(G-A-M-E-R-S)
We are gamers
(G-A-M-E-R-S)
We are gamers
(Fubuki)
Appearing foxily is the fox
This is Fubuki Shirakami, a white-haired furry ear

Hi friends (Yeah!)
Hi friends (Yeah!)
Ages and moderns, give me some corn tea
I'm not an AI, my specialty is MC
I prefer gold carp over red love

A black wolf with a ribbon
I'm the Mom of the Gamers, always watching
If you have a problem, tell me right away
I'm a bit clumsy, but I'll do my best

Okayu, the cat that can eat anything
My voice is smooth, I'm the rice ball master

Let's play games together all night long
Mogu mogu (Mogu mogu)

Korone, the dog who loves to play
